top_signals.title: World absorbs historic Iran war oil supply loss, but depleted stocks bring risks
top_signals.summary: Replenishing oil stocks, never cheap, has likely been made more expensive by the war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Oil Steadies After Recent Slump With Hormuz Flows in Focus
top_signals.summary: Oil held onto its recent run of losses, with traders looking for clues on flows through the Strait of Hormuz as barrels continue to return to the market after months of disruption.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: $60.4K Becomes 'most important area': Five things to know in Bitcoin this week
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin saw its highest levels in nearly two weeks at the weekly close, but bulls needed a push beyond $65,000 for real trend inflection, said the latest BTC price analysis.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
